questions.question: Explain the main differences between UDP and TCP in the context of IoT applications. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Compare the connection-oriented and connectionless nature of these protocols

questions.question: What is the purpose of CoAP (Constrained Application Protocol) in IoT applications? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe its relation to HTTP and MQTT

questions.question: Describe the role of QoS (Quality of Service) in IoT applications, particularly in relation to CoAP and MQTT. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the importance of QoS in ensuring reliable data transmission
